title: dracaena bugandana
intro: Dracaena bugandana, also known as the Dragon Tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Madagascar, belonging to the Dracaena genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its bark containing a milky sap, known as dragon's blood, which is rich in medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The medicinal properties of Dracaena bugandana have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while its health benefits include antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the sap is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infused in oils to harness its medicinal properties.
